evidence_snippets.snippet: File exists but contains NO GENERAL_NAME_cmp function
GENERAL_NAME union has ASN1_TYPE *other for GEN_EDIPARTY; no ediPartyName member
git grep -rn GENERAL_NAME_cmp OpenSSL-engine-0_9_6: zero matches across all .c/.h files

reasoning_summary: GENERAL_NAME_cmp (the function containing the NULL ptr deref via edipartyname comparison) does not exist in OpenSSL-engine-0_9_6. The fix commit f960d812 modifies GENERAL_NAME_cmp, GENERAL_NAME_set0_value, and GENERAL_NAME_get0_value plus adds edipartyname_cmp, but in this tag none of these functions are present. The file v3_genn.c exists but is an older version lacking these functions entirely. The struct union uses ASN1_TYPE *other for GEN_EDIPARTY with no separate ediPartyName member. The vulnerability root cause cannot manifest because the anchor function is absent.
